descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos defeat Richmond Sockeyes 6-1 in Centennial Cup round-robin play.
descriptionLong: Humboldt Broncos advanced to the Centennial Cup final with a 6-1 victory over Richmond Sockeyes on Wednesday in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Bill McDougall and Garnett Kazuik each scored twice for Humboldt, which finished the round-robin with a 3-0 record. Richmond, despite the loss, moved to a 2-1 record and qualified for the semifinal against Pembroke Lumber Kings, scheduled for that evening.
